_WARNING: FABRICATED MISSION TYPES — Core Rules uses D10 objective tables (Move Through, Deliver, Access, Patrol, Fight Off, Search, Defend, Acquire, Secure, Protect, Eliminate). This file has invented types (Salvage, Rescue, Bounty Hunt, Exploration, Convoy). See data/patron_generation.json for verified objectives.

_metadata.name: Mission Generation Data
_metadata.description: All mission generation text data for FiveParsecsMissionGenerator. Locations, factions, titles, descriptions, objectives, special rules.
_metadata.source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules

difficulty_descriptions.1: This should be a straightforward mission.
difficulty_descriptions.2: A standard operation with moderate risk.
difficulty_descriptions.4: A high-risk operation with serious dangers.
difficulty_descriptions.5: An extremely dangerous mission with overwhelming odds.

type_descriptions.0: Engage and defeat enemy forces in direct combat.
type_descriptions.1: Complete a specialized task for an influential patron.
type_descriptions.2: A pivotal mission that will advance your crew's story.
type_descriptions.3: Face off against a rival crew competing for the same objective.
type_descriptions.4: Recover valuable salvage from a dangerous location.
type_descriptions.5: Extract hostages or stranded personnel from enemy territory.
type_descriptions.6: Track down and capture or eliminate a high-value target.
type_descriptions.7: Explore an uncharted area and document your findings.
type_descriptions.8: Protect a convoy of vehicles from enemy attacks.
type_descriptions.9: Hold a strategic position against waves of enemies.

7: Explore at least 3 points of interest
9: Prevent enemy access to the objective

bonus_objectives: Find and secure the secret weapon
